EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ISpatialReferenceFactory6

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to members that control the geographic transformations fallback mechanism.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("049CA1D5-CEE1-4C4D-B718-B465AA3A08F3")]
public interface ISpatialReferenceFactory6 : ISpatialReferenceFactory5, ISpatialReferenceFactory4, ISpatialReferenceFactory3, ISpatialReferenceFactory2, ISpatialReferenceFactory

Properties

GeoTransformationDefaults 

IGeoTransformationOperationSet GeoTransformationDefaults { get; }

Property Value

IGeoTransformationOperationSet

GeoTransformationFallback 

bool GeoTransformationFallback { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

UseShapePreservingProject

Enables/disables shape preserving project. Default is False.

bool UseShapePreservingProject { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

vbYesNo double
minSegmentLengthInDegrees double

double
